scenario.title: Ask which office location to visit
scenario.goal: Find out which office location is best and ask for the address.

known_facts.preference: closest office if multiple locations exist

must_try: Ask which location you should go to.
Ask for the address if multiple locations exist.
scenario.success_condition: The agent provides location guidance or asks clarifying questions about which office is appropriate.
good_bug_signals: The agent assumes a location without enough information.
The agent gives conflicting location details.
The agent fails to provide useful address guidance.

retell_llm_dynamic_variables.success_condition: The agent provides location guidance or asks clarifying questions about which office is appropriate.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.goal: Find out which office location is best and ask for the address.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.must_try: Ask which location you should go to. | Ask for the address if multiple locations exist.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.title: Ask which office location to visit
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.known_facts: location_uncertainty=yes; preference=closest office if multiple locations exist

call_data.transcript:
Agent: Hi, 
User: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. 
Agent: That's 
User: Thanks for calling Pibbett Point Orthopedics. Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria? 
Agent: Yes, this is Maria Lopez.
User: For verification, may I have your date of birth? 
Agent: Sure, my date of birth is May 14, 1982.
User: The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, all accept it. How can I help you today, Maria? 
Agent: Thank you. I’m a little confused about which office I should go to, since I’m not sure which location is best. Could you help me figure out which office is closest, and give me the address?
User: Your main office is Pivot Point Orthopaedics. At two twenty Athens Way, Nashville, If you need another location or more details, just let me know. 
Agent: Thank you! Is that the only location, or are there other offices as well? I’d like to make sure I’m going to the closest one.
User: Pivot Point Orthopaedics has just one main at two two zero Athens Way in Nashville. That's the only location for appointments and visits. 
User: If you need directions or help with parking, let me know. 
Agent: Thank you, that’s really helpful! I think I’m all set for now. Have a great day!
User: You're welcome, Maria. If you need anything else, just give us a call. Have a great day. 
Agent: Thanks again! Goodbye.

metadata.scenario_title: Ask which office location to visit

call_analysis.call_summary: The agent called Maria Lopez to verify her information and assist her in finding the closest office location. Maria was informed that Pivot Point Orthopaedics has only one main office at 220 Athens Way, Nashville, and was offered additional help if needed. The call ended positively with Maria satisfied and no further assistance required.
